overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character exploring a Southern plantation mansion and its formal gardens. The character walks along a curved brick path beside the mansion, descends a staircase into manicured gardens, and approaches a central fountain and glass conservatory on a bright sunny day.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the curved brick path beside the mansion, passing white columns and garden hedges

entered.detail: large white colonial-style mansion with wraparound porch and second-floor balcony
tall ionic columns supporting the mansion porch roof
curved red brick walkway with grass growing between stones
black ornate vintage gas lamp on metal post
tall manicured green hedge forming property boundary
mature oak tree with Spanish moss hanging from branches
stacked wooden barrels and canvas sacks in side yard

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved brick path beside a grand plantation mansion with tall white columns. The area is lined with manicured hedges, mature oak trees with hanging moss, and vintage gas lamps, with stacked supplies visible in the side yard.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase descending to lower garden level

events.description: character begins descending the white stone balustrade stairs into the lower garden

agents.ego_description: walking down the wide white stone staircase with decorative railings into the lower garden level

entered.detail: wide formal staircase with white balustrade railings on both sides
tall palm tree near the mansion corner

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and descends an elegant white stone staircase with decorative balustrades, transitioning from the mansion's upper terrace to the manicured gardens below. The mansion facade recedes to the right while the path ahead opens into the lower garden.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden with flower beds and classical landscaping

events.description: path opens into formal garden plaza with central fountain becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the formal garden paths, passing classical statues and raised flower beds while approaching the central fountain

entered.detail: large decorative stone urn planters on square pedestals
classical white stone statue on pedestal among greenery
raised brick flower beds with red and green plantings
large ornate three-tiered circular stone fountain
greenhouse structure with glass panels and green iron framework

segments.scene_description: The character explores a sun-drenched formal garden with herringbone brick pathways, classical stone statues, and raised flower beds. A large three-tier fountain and an ornate glass conservatory become visible in the distance as the character progresses through the manicured landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: central garden plaza with fountain and conservatory entrance

events.description: character circles around the right side of the fountain while approaching the conservatory

agents.ego_description: circling the central fountain and approaching the ornate glass conservatory building entrance

entered.detail: matching stone urns flanking the conservatory entrance pathway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and circles the central three-tier fountain in a spacious brick-paved plaza, heading toward an ornate glass and iron conservatory. Stone urn planters line the final approach to the building entrance as the conservatory dominates the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the stately perimeter of a plantation mansion down into the heart of its sun-drenched formal gardens. It begins by tracking along a curved brick path beside grand white columns, passing under moss-draped oak trees and vintage gas lamps. As the character reaches an elegant white stone staircase, the camera descends from the upper terrace, causing the mansion facade to recede as the landscape opens into the lower gardens. The scene then expands across herringbone brick pathways and past classical stone statues, with a large three-tier fountain and a glass conservatory gradually emerging in the distance. Finally, the movement leads through a spacious brick-paved plaza and past stone urn planters, circling the central fountain before coming to a stop before the ornate glass and iron conservatory.
